name: @firegrid/durable
description: Firegrid.Durable — the platform's public API surface (L2). Ratified contract; bodies land via the T1 red corpus.

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Durable.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/durable diagnostics are covered by dotnet build'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/durable lint is covered by F# compile'
